title: True Brotherhood
content:
God, what a world, if men in street and mart
    Felt that same kinship of the human heart
    Which makes them, in the face of flame and flood,
    Rise to the meaning of true Brotherhood!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ella Wheeler Wilcox, titled "True Brotherhood", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
